text:
Miwal University (, Miwaru Daigaku) is an educational institution that Prince Halkenburg Hui Guo Rou once attended. It is considered the most prestigious university in the world. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 350 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

In Kurapika's inner monologue focusing on Prince Halkenburg, it's stated that the Prince attended the Miwal University at age 15, majored in Physics, and won a silver medal in the world championships of archery he participated in there. 

Trivia

Miwal University is presumably based on the University of Oxford, given the same architectural design and reputation that both universities share.
The University of Oxford is also considered the most prestigious university in the world, according to the Times Higher Education World University Rankings.
